name: AgencyBloc Life & Health Insurance CRM API
what_it_does: AgencyBloc REST API for life and health insurance agency management and CRM platform. Enables AI agents to manage individual and group insurance client and policy records, track life and health insurance commissions and overrides, handle group benefits enrollment and employee records, retrieve policy renewal and lapse data, access agency analytics and production reports, manage carrier data integrations, handle Medicare/Medicaid supplement and ACA marketplace workflows, and connect agency data with carrier commission systems and accounting platforms.
use_cases: Managing life and health insurance client and policy records from agency management agents
Tracking commission data and overrides from agency analytics agents
Managing group benefits enrollment from HR and benefits integration agents
Handling Medicare supplement and ACA marketplace workflows from enrollment agents
not_for: P&C insurance agencies without life and health policy focus
Captive insurance agents without independent agency commission tracking
Non-insurance businesses without life/health carrier and commission data
best_when: An independent life and health insurance agency or benefits broker using AgencyBloc wants AI agents to automate client and policy management, commission tracking, enrollment workflows, and agency analytics.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY+HIPAA: Life and health insurance data includes PHI (health information in policies) and sensitive financial data. Commission data is confidential business information. ACA enrollment data may be subject to HIPAA. HIPAA BAA may be required for health data.

auth.notes: AgencyBloc uses API key authentication. Agency-level credentials. No granular scope control. Limited public developer documentation. Integration via partner program and CSV/data export for some use cases.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — insurance AMS subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-user pricing; plans based on agency size
pricing.notes: Grinnell, Iowa. Founded 2010. Market leader for independent life and health insurance agency CRM. Focus on life, health, Medicare, and group benefits brokers. 50,000+ insurance professionals. Strong Medicare supplement and ACA expertise. Competes with Vertafore AgencyBloc (different product) for L&H market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY+HIPAA: L&H insurance data includes health PHI — BAA may be required
No public MCP server — API key with limited documentation
No webhooks — polling required for policy and commission updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full agency data access
Medicare enrollment workflows have CMS compliance requirements
ACA marketplace enrollment has strict annual open enrollment period rules
agent_readiness.security_notes: Life and health insurance data with potential PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. API key only. US data residency. BAA may be required for health plan data.

security_score_components.security_notes: L&H insurance and potential PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. API key only. US data residency. BAA may be needed.
